release_body: This release is the first one distributed via PyPI.
SENet models are ready to use
This release reworks some of the confusion between file names/paths and module names/paths.

Changelog:

- Migrated to Django 1.10
- New tinymce plugins included
- Search now working properly
- Many other bugs were fixed
ANNOgesic version 0.7.22

* Corrected issue with configuration values for AWS and AWS SNS+SQS settings.

* Improved testing suite and more code coverage for integration tests.

- Extend options already loaded instead of replacing them
- Correct some issues preventing proper operation with flake8 3.5.0
- Register pytest marker for flake8

* Added handling for internal repr failures.
* Fixed issues with displaying code that has non-ascii characters.
* Implemented better display for ``call`` frames so that when a function has decorators the
  function definition is shown (instead of just the first decorator).
  See: [#8](https://github.com/ionelmc/python-hunter/issues/8).

## Changelog

- Added option to specify top level domain of authentication URL
- Changed status messages to display errors from authentication response

### Bug fixes

* Hard links were not added back to the squashed image, now it's fiexd #94 

### Enhancements

* Added tests to run on Python 3.5

- Change max file name/path length to configurable
- Add support for Python 3.6

add support for :text attributes
some refactoring

release_name: Ignore case sensitive in postal codes
release_body:
* Ignore case sensitive in postal codes,
* fix encoding issue in python 3.5
* update validation data
Fixes url encoded workspace URIs
* This release is just to sync with nupic.bindings 0.3.1.

Fixes the following bugs identified in v2.0:
1. Fixes "Multiple source files match" error when the same source file is reachable via multiple entries in sys.path.
2. Fixes "No line N in file foo.py" error seen by deferred breakpoints when the corresponding foo.py module gets activated.

- Storing all connection data on `Client` instead of on private `Connection` (#2970)
- Changing from Beta to Alpha classifier (#3027)
- Renaming `connection` module as `_http` and making `Connection` class non-public. (#3033)
- `google.cloud.dns.__version__` attribute added (#3046)
- On HTTP requests, sending `X-Goog-API-Client` header with value `gl-python/x.y.z gccl/a.b.c` where `x.y.z` is the version of Python that is running and `a.b.c` is the version of the DNS package being used (#3046)

PyPI: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/google-cloud-dns/0.23.0

**Bug Fixes**

  * Fix AWS4Auth error.

The module has been published to PyPI.

View HISTORY.rst of the module for a changelog.

https://pypi.org/project/azure-cli-dla/0.0.10

Full release notes at https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/release-notes-azure-cli
* #472: fix issue with traffic switching
Fixed some typos.  Nothing critical.
Set warning log for some 404 errors
